name: dev-team
description: Nayoo dev-team workflow for Codex subagent orchestration and parallel work-item delegation.

interface.longDescription: Let a lead AGENT receive work, inspect the repo, plan, delegate to Nayoo repo-specific Codex subagents, wait for results, review/verify, and report outcomes for single or parallel work items.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $dev-team to plan, delegate, and report a repo-split subagent workflow for this feature, bug, or worklist.
